results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: War harm is inflicted BY Israel ON Lebanon (attributed to Israel); Lebanon's own conduct is mixed (protection-oriented ministry vs. differential refugee treatment); no own-conduct basis to move.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Borno IPC Phase 5 catastrophe risk was already priced in the 2026-06-19 downgrade to 18.0; re-scoring would double-count. Near-floor; confirm.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Export-control directive is government action ON Anthropic (attributed to US gov); Anthropic's transparent, principled response is consistent with the existing cost-of-conscience baseline.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Russia's strikes attributed to Russia; no new own-conduct evidence; baseline sustained.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Jun 20 emergency + 17 deaths are the resolution phase of the already-priced blockade arc; near-floor limitation applies; full resolution-reassessment due ~Jul 23.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: 69+ (up to 73) UN staff arbitrarily detained by Houthi de-facto authority; one died in custody; reinforces Yemen's floor (no movement possible).

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Civil-war re-escalation, aid weaponization, sexual violence and forced recruitment reinforce the floor; no movement possible.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: First AI-safety whistleblower retaliation suit (unadjudicated) reinforces xAI's floor under pre-adjudication discipline; no movement possible.

results.name: Rwanda
results.key_finding: Scan's 41.8 is STALE; canonical baseline is 27.3 (verified). HRW 'Death Was Everywhere' continues the already-scored M23/Rwanda arc; no new adjudicated on-Rwanda conduct; confirm at 27.3.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Gaza ceasefire violations (1,000+ killed since Jun 17), aid throttling, Lebanon displacement (possible war crime per HRW/OHCHR) are own conduct; reinforce the floor; no movement possible.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Sahel food crisis + drone strikes + UN-documented enforced-disappearance pattern continue the already-priced state-perpetration arc; near-floor reinforcement only.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: UN Special Procedures document systematic enforced disappearances by Malian forces + Wagner ('may constitute CAH', pre-adjudication); uniform 12.5 baseline appears under-calibrated vs reweighted peer Burkina Faso (6.3). Routed as calibration flag-for-review, NOT a one-off reset.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: M23/Rwanda conduct attributed to Rwanda, not DRC; Ebola (2nd-largest ever) strains DRC's own response but is not deliberate state harm; near-floor reinforcement only.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: 784+ executions YTD (37-year high) and mass arbitrary arrests continue the priced repression arc; near-floor limitation = evidence-tier reinforcement, no composite move.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Daily strikes, systematic torture/incommunicado detention of Ukrainians, ICC prosecutor intimidation — own conduct reinforcing the floor; no movement possible.

results.name: Kosovo
results.key_finding: No material within-window evidence; uniform-seed baseline confirmed (low confidence); recommend a full from-evidence assessment.

results.name: Malawi
results.key_finding: No material within-window evidence; uniform-seed baseline confirmed (low confidence); recommend a full from-evidence assessment.

results.name: Côte d'Ivoire
results.key_finding: No material within-window evidence; uniform-seed baseline confirmed (low confidence); recommend a full from-evidence assessment.

results.name: Liberia
results.key_finding: No material within-window evidence; uniform-seed baseline confirmed (low confidence); recommend a full from-evidence assessment.

results.name: Benin
results.key_finding: No material within-window evidence; uniform-seed baseline confirmed (low confidence); recommend a full from-evidence assessment.

false_positives_screened_out.screened_rationale: Scan reported a stale 41.8 'near boundary' figure inviting an upgrade. Canonical baseline is 27.3 (set 2026-04-16, verified via scoring.mjs). The 41.8 figure and any 'can't be this low' intuition are explicitly NON-evidence. HRW 'Death Was Everywhere' continues the already-scored M23/Rwanda arc with no new adjudicated on-Rwanda conduct. Upgrade screened out under §3e-bis(2)(3); confirmed at 27.3.

A downgrade on the 'confirmed' Borno Phase 5 catastrophe would double-count the same Jun 17 hotspot event already applied in the 2026-06-19 downgrade to 18.0. Screened out under §3e-bis(4) (rationale-vs-history) + near-floor limitation; confirmed at 18.0.

A one-off downgrade on UN-documented enforced disappearances was screened out under §3e-bis(5): the finding is 'may constitute CAH' (pre-adjudication) and the real issue is cross-peer calibration (Mali 12.5 > reweighted Burkina Faso 6.3). Routed as flag-for-review for coordinator-level ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT, not an assessor one-off.

math_hygiene.note: All 20 assessed-entity published composites reconstruct exactly via canonical v1.2 formula (drift 0.0). Validator returned 0 errors; the 131 warnings are pre-existing in us-cities.json and us-states.json and do not involve any assessed entity.
